dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your proxy nodes in real-time.

console.title: System Logs
console.subtitle: Detailed execution traces from the background engine.

ranking.no_groups_desc: You haven't added any Clash proxy groups to monitor yet.
ranking.add_groups_desc: Add some groups in Settings to discover and rank your nodes here.

settings.subtitle: Manage your Clash API and Node Rover settings.
settings.monitored_groups_desc: Select which Clash proxy groups the watchdog should monitor and speed-test.
settings.comma_separated_desc: Comma separated list of groups. Click "Fetch Groups" to select from Clash API.
settings.tolerance_desc: Don't switch if the current node is within this many score points of the best node.
settings.max_concurrency_desc: Maximum number of simultaneous ping requests to send.
settings.ping_count_desc: Number of pings per node for better average
settings.max_backoff_desc: Max rounds to skip failing nodes
settings.test_group_desc: The system will switch this group to the target node and send requests through the proxy below.
settings.target_urls_desc: Before switching, the system will send GET requests to all these URLs simultaneously. All requests must succeed to proceed.
settings.sys_int_desc: Configure how Node Rover integrates with your operating system.
settings.autostart_desc: Start Node Rover automatically when you log in. It will start silently in the system tray.

setup.title: Setup Wizard
setup.welcome_desc: An intelligent, high-performance background engine that monitors and automatically switches your Clash proxies to the fastest nodes available.
setup.connect_api_desc: Rover needs to communicate with your Clash or Clash Meta core via its External Controller API.
setup.select_groups_desc: Choose which proxy groups (Selectors) you want Rover to continuously speed-test and optimize.
setup.no_groups_found: No groups found or API disconnected.
setup.all_set_desc: Clash Node Rover is now ready to optimize your network experience. You can always tweak advanced rules, latency tolerance, and HTTP verification in the Settings tab.

about.title: About Clash Node Rover
about.description: Lightweight and smart node management and testing tool
about.author: Author
